message:
Running command: # librelane uses CIEL to fetch the PDK! It calls ciel.fetch() with opdks_rev.
# The opdks_rev (Open PDK revision) is what determines the hash 8afc8346.
# get_opdks_rev() returns the version that librelane expects.
python3 -c "
from librelane.flows.cli import get_opdks_rev
print('Expected OPDKS revision:', get_opdks_rev())
" 2>/dev/null
